incident_details.short_description: Lead synchronization failed between Website and CRM
incident_details.description: Marketing team reports that leads submitted via the corporate website are not appearing in Dynamics 365. Potential loss of business leads.

resolution.root_cause: The Azure AD Client Secret used by the Logic App to authenticate with the Dynamics 365 Web API expired yesterday.
resolution_steps: 1. Checked Azure Logic App run history and confirmed '401 Unauthorized' errors.
2. Generated a new Client Secret in the Azure Active Directory (App Registration).
3. Updated the API Connection parameters in the Logic App with the new secret.
4. Manually re-triggered failed runs to push pending leads into CRM.
5. Set a calendar reminder/alert for secret expiration 30 days prior to next expiry.
